tool_failures.message: msg2: nearby_places returned lookup_failed error. AI gracefully fell back to knowledge-based recommendations. Non-blocking.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 6 companion-mode informational queries were answered directly and concisely (74-149 words each) without triggering any itinerary tool calls. The critical message 6 ('Recommend something fun to do tonight') -- the known over-fire trigger from Run 5 N-01 msg5 -- passed cleanly with no create_itinerary_items or delete_itinerary_items invocation. Itinerary count remained stable at 12 items throughout (N_BEFORE=12, N_AFTER=12). The AI used get_weather for msg1 (appropriate) and nearby_places for msg2 (appropriate, though it returned a lookup_failed error and the AI gracefully fell back to knowledge). Messages 3-6 required no tool calls and the AI answered directly from knowledge. All responses were phone-friendly and under 300 words. No response falsely claimed to have modified the itinerary, and no response refused to answer due to itinerary modification concerns. The PR #201 companion-mode guardrail is working as designed.
